items.blurb: Jimmy Butler may not return in 2026-27 — The Golden State Warriors signed Jimmy Butler to an extension last season in hopes of getting two seasons with him alongside Steph Curry. They may end up only getting half a season.

items.blurb: Taylor Jenkins Meets With Bucks To Discuss Head Coaching Vacancy — Taylor Jenkins met in Memphis last week with Jon Horst, Wes Edens and Jimmy Haslam to discuss the franchise's head coaching vacancy. The two sides are expected to meet again soon to further discuss the opening. Jenkins was head coach of the Memphis Grizzlies from 2019 until he was abruptly fired near the end of the 2024-25 season.

items.title: Bucks Expected To Keep Jon Horst As General Manager
items.blurb: Bucks Expected To Keep Jon Horst As General Manager — The Milwaukee Bucks are expected to retain Jon Horst as general manager, according to Marc Stein of The Stein Line. Horst, Wes Edens and Jimmy Haslam recently met with Taylor Jenkins to discuss the team's head coaching vacancy. Horst also said earlier in the month that the Bucks have not decided on Giannis Antetokounmpo's future with the team.

summary: Bucks Expected To Keep Jon Horst As General Manager — The Milwaukee Bucks are expected to retain Jon Horst as general manager, according to Marc Stein of The Stein Line. Horst also said earlier in the month that the Bucks have not decided on Giannis Antetokounmpo's future with the team.
